termsForm.title: Terms and Conditions
termsForm.termsContent:
TERMS AND CONDITIONS

Last updated: December 31, 2025

Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using our service.

1. INTRODUCTION

These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of our e-commerce platform and services. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of these Terms, you may not access the service.

2. MERCHANT AGREEMENT

By registering as a merchant on our platform, you agree to:
• Provide accurate and complete business information
• Maintain the security of your account credentials
• Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
• Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
• Provide quality products and services to customers

3. BUSINESS CONDUCT

Merchants must:
• List products accurately with correct descriptions and pricing
• Honor all confirmed orders and transactions
• Provide timely shipping and delivery
• Handle customer complaints professionally
• Maintain appropriate inventory levels
• Not engage in fraudulent or deceptive practices

4. FEES AND PAYMENTS

• Platform fees and commission rates will be as agreed in your merchant agreement
• Payment processing fees may apply
• All fees are subject to change with 30 days notice
• You are responsible for all applicable taxes

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

You retain ownership of your content but grant us a license to use, display, and distribute it on our platform. You must not infringe on others' intellectual property rights.

6. PROHIBITED ACTIVITIES

Merchants may not:
• Sell counterfeit, illegal, or prohibited items
• Engage in price manipulation
• Create fake reviews or ratings
• Attempt to bypass platform fees
• Violate any applicable laws or regulations

7. TERMINATION

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account for violations of these Terms. You may terminate your account at any time with proper notice.

8. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

Our platform is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

9. DISPUTE RESOLUTION

Any disputes will be resolved through arbitration in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction where our company is registered.

10. CHANGES TO TERMS

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of any changes, and your continued use constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.

11. CONTACT INFORMATION

For questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@example.com.

By proceeding, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
